description_long: This shotgun features a robust, dark metallic barrel with a cylindrical upper receiver and a prominent, wide muzzle. The stock and foregrip are crafted from a wood-textured material, providing a classic aesthetic and ergonomic handling. Metal bands secure the barrel assembly, and the trigger mechanism is housed within a rounded guard. The rear of the shotgun has a thick, curved wooden buttstock, while the front end is dominated by a large, flared muzzle. The overall design is compact, with a short barrel and a sturdy, utilitarian build. The combination of wood and metal elements gives it a traditional yet functional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact shotgun with a dark metal barrel, wood-textured stock and foregrip, and a wide flared muzzle. The design is robust and traditional, blending wood and metal elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wood-textured stock, foregrip, and the cylindrical barrel with metal bands.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the large, flared muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with the cylindrical receiver visible behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the wood and metal construction and the trigger guard profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden buttstock and the circular end of the receiver, with the trigger guard and grip visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with a wide flared muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
